name: Hugh Palin
label: Computer Engineering Student @ UIUC
summary: I'm a UIUC computer engineering student focused on embedded systems, software development, and computational science. Experienced in high-performance computing, database development, and PCB design.

work_experience.summary: Conducted research to identify enzymatic pathways to produce value-added products using computational modeling.
highlights: Automated molecular structure generation with Python, reducing manual input by 99%
Integrated Python workflow with machine learning models
Simulated enzyme-substrate interactions using HPC and QM/MM techniques

work_experience.summary: Modernized internal database systems and improved searchability of archived reports.
highlights: Digitized paper-based reports using Python for automation
Enhanced full-text search using SQL and metadata indexing

work_experience.summary: Worked on embedded systems for rocket test stands and environmental hardware.
highlights: Enabled real-time TCP data logging via Raspberry Pi
Designed PCBs in KiCAD and implemented durable soldering practices

projects.title: Shell Shockers
projects.summary: Turn-based tank game on an FPGA inspired by Shell Shock Live.
highlights: Built VGA interface using BRAM and custom controller modules
Handled keyboard input with MicroBlaze processor via SPI and USB
Displayed input using UART protocol to external screen

projects.title: Convolutional Neural Network
projects.summary: Built LeNet-5 based CNN using C and GPU acceleration.
highlights: Implemented forward pass of CNN for handwritten digit recognition
Used cuBLAS and shared memory tiling for speedup on A40 GPU

projects.title: PDB-Pal
projects.summary: Python tools to configure PDB files for simulations.
highlights: Automated simulation dataset generation on HPC cluster
Improved MM accuracy and minimized QM simulation errors
